data.title: In HelloNation, HVAC Experts Dan and Matt Ambrose Explain HVAC Repair Cost in Rochester, NY, and What Affects Pricing
data.description: A recent publication discusses the primary factors affecting HVAC repair costs to aid Rochester, NY residents in managing their budget expectations. Released on May 29, 2026, the article by HelloNation delves into the determinants of HVAC repair expenses in Rochester, N.Y. By analyzing these key cost drivers, homeowners can gain insights into the pricing norms in the local market.

data.title: Alys Beach Residence Sets Historic $28 Million Sales Record
data.description: A residence located at 53 Sea Castle Alley in Alys Beach, Florida has set a new standard for luxury real estate along 30A. The gulf-front property was recently sold for a remarkable $28 million, marking it as the highest residential sale ever recorded in Alys Beach. This sale, which took place on May 29, 2026, signifies a significant milestone in the upscale real estate market of the area.

data.title: Study finds 5 AI models disagree on 67% of 1,000 real-world claims in fact-checking experiment.
data.description: A research study provided a sample of 1,000 real-world claims to be fact-checked by five cutting-edge AI models. Out of these claims, the AI models held conflicting opinions on 67% of them.

data.title: Paxos achieves SEC clearing agency approval, a first in blockchain, signifies progress for U.S. securities settlement.
data.description: Paxos achieves a significant milestone by obtaining registration as a clearing agency with the SEC. This development is noteworthy for blockchain technology within the U.S. securities settlement realm. This achievement signals Paxos' compliance with regulatory standards set forth by the SEC, further enhancing trust in blockchain-based solutions. This event is a crucial step towards transforming the securities industry through innovative technologies.

data.title: NEW PRODUCT: New ATEX EasySwitch® Wet-Dry Vac for Industrial Cleanup in Explosive Environments
data.description: The recently launched ATEX EasySwitch® Wet-Dry Vac by EXAIR in Cincinnati on May 29, 2026, is specially designed for industrial cleanup in hazardous environments like ATEX Zones 1 and 21. This pneumatic system ensures safe and reliable operations in areas with potentially explosive atmospheres.

data.title: Ambarella Stock Slides After Lackluster Q1 Results
data.description: Shares of Ambarella Inc (NASDAQ: AMBA) are plummeting after the company announced its first-quarter results and second-quarter sales guidance, which fell short of Wall Street expectations. The stock is experiencing significant weakness following this news. In the first quarter, Ambarella reported earnings of 11 cents per share, surpassing the 10 cent consensus estimate and marking a substantial improvement from the 7 cents reported a year ago. Revenue for the quarter reached approximately $100.36 million, slightly exceeding the estimated $100.14 million and representing a nearly 17% increase from the same period last year. The company's official release from Santa Clara stated that total revenue for the quarter amounted to $100.4 million. Additionally, on a non-GAAP basis, gross margin... data.title: BTC drops to six-week lows, analyst predicts $72K as end of dip. Price action separates from US markets.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin dropped to its lowest point since mid-April as it deviated from the bullish trend in US stock markets.
